hero.name: Nico Cantarelli
hero.intro: Frontend developer specializing in Shopify themes, WordPress, and custom web development. You bring the design, I bring it to life.

shopify.title: Shopify Themes
shopify.description: Custom themes built from scratch or modifications to existing ones. Pixel-perfect from Figma, optimized for conversion.

wordpress.title: WordPress Sites
wordpress.description: Custom themes, headless setups with Next.js, and plugin development. Full control over your content.

landing.title: Landing Pages
landing.description: Fast-turnaround marketing pages. React, Next.js, or static HTML depending on your needs.

maintenance.title: Maintenance & Support
maintenance.description: Ongoing updates, performance optimization, and accessibility improvements for existing sites.

items.quote: Nico is an exceptional developer. He took our Figma designs and brought them to life with pixel-perfect accuracy. Fast, communicative, and a pleasure to work with.
items.author: Sarah Chen

items.quote: Working with Nico was seamless. He understood our brand vision immediately and delivered a Shopify theme that exceeded our expectations.
items.author: Marco Rossi

items.quote: Reliable, skilled, and genuinely cares about the craft. Nico's attention to detail and clean code made our project a success.
items.author: Emily Watson

about.title: // About
paragraphs: I'm a frontend developer based in Argentina, having lived in Berlin, Turin, and Boston along the way. I studied programming in Berlin, and for the past year led development at {agency}, building e-commerce sites for brands like Tashola, Baudie, and Walkfully.
Now I'm branching out on my own.
I work best with designers and agencies who have the vision. I handle the build. I speak English, Spanish and Italian, so wherever you're based, we can work together.

contact.title: // Let's work together
contact.intro: Have a project with designs ready? Let's talk.

success.title: Message sent!
success.line2: I'll get back to you soon.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

lab.title: Component Lab
lab.description: Interactive UI experiments and micro-interactions. Hover, scroll, and click around.

buttonEffects.title: // Button Effects
buttonEffects.description: Hover effects that make buttons feel alive. Fill, ripple, magnetic, glow, underline, and scale.

textReveal.title: // Text Reveal on Scroll
textReveal.description: Words and characters reveal as you scroll. Built with IntersectionObserver, no libraries.

productCard.title: // Product Card
productCard.description: E-commerce cards with 3D tilt on hover and a sliding overlay for quick actions.

scrollReveal.title: // Scroll Product Reveal
scrollReveal.description: A product transforms as you scroll — fading, rotating, scaling, and revealing details.

addToCart.title: // Add to Cart Animation
addToCart.description: Micro-interaction: button morphs, product flies to cart, counter bounces.

pageTransitions.title: // Page Transitions
pageTransitions.description: View Transitions API demo with fade, slide, and morph effects between pages.

drawers.title: // Drawer Components
drawers.description: Bottom and side drawers with drag-to-dismiss, snap points, nested stacking, and forms. Pure CSS + vanilla React.

microInteractions.title: // CSS Micro-interactions
microInteractions.description: Looping UI animations built entirely with CSS keyframes. No JavaScript, no libraries — just @keyframes and elastic easing.

metadata.title: Nico Cantarelli
metadata.description: Frontend developer specializing in Shopify themes, WordPress, and custom web development. Pixel-perfect builds from your designs.
